title: E002: Keystone CRD Tests
description:
**Size:** 🔨 medium
**Category:** backend
**Priority:** high
**Feature ID:** CC-0012

## Summary

CC-0012 adds two test layers for the Keystone CRD and webhooks. First, envtest integration tests (`//go:build integration`) verify that the generated CRD installs correctly, that a valid `Keystone` CR is accepted by the API server, that invalid CRs are rejected by CEL schema validation rules (mutual exclusivity constraints, minimum values), and that the webhook defaulter populates zero-valued fields. Second, a Chainsaw E2E test at `tests/e2e/keystone/invalid-cr/` deploys the operator to a real cluster and asserts HTTP 422 rejection for invalid cron expressions in `fernet.rotationSchedule` and duplicate `configSection` values in `plugins`. Webhook registration is wired into `main.go` to unblock E2E testing.

## Scope

**Included:**
- Wire `(&keystonev1alpha1.KeystoneWebhook{}).SetupWebhookWithManager(mgr)` in `operators/keystone/main.go` (resolving the existing `TODO(CC-0012)`)
- Generate webhook manifests via `controller-gen webhook` to create `operators/keystone/config/webhook/` (prerequisite for envtest `WebhookInstallOptions`)
- envtest integration test file `operators/keystone/api/v1alpha1/integration_test.go` with `//go:build integration` tag
- Test: CRD installs successfully in envtest (API resource discoverable)
- Test: Valid `Keystone` CR accepted (using `validKeystone()` pattern from existing `keystone_webhook_test.go`)
- Test: Invalid CRs rejected by CRD CEL rules (database clusterRef/host exclusivity, cache clusterRef/servers exclusivity, replicas < 1, maxActiveKeys < 3, policyOverrides empty)
- Test: Webhook defaulter sets `replicas=3`, `cache.backend="dogpile.cache.pymemcache"`, `bootstrap.adminUser="admin"`, `bootstrap.region="RegionOne"`, `fernet.maxActiveKeys=3` when zero-valued
- Dedicated Keystone envtest helper `operators/keystone/internal/testutil/envtest_setup.go` wrapping `envtest.Environment` with `WebhookInstallOptions`
- Chainsaw test directory `tests/e2e/keystone/invalid-cr/` with `chainsaw-test.yaml` (API `v1alpha2`, matching `tests/e2e/chainsaw-config.yaml`)
- Chainsaw test case: apply CR with invalid cron expression → expect HTTP 422
- Chainsaw test case: apply CR with duplicate plugin `configSection` → expect HTTP 422
- Keystone scheme registration local to the integration test (not modifying `SharedScheme()`)

**Excluded:**
- Reconciler integration tests (CC-0014, depends on CC-0013)
- Full Chainsaw E2E suite — basic-deployment, fernet-rotation, scale, etc. (CC-0016, depends on CC-0013)
- Modifying `SharedScheme()` in `internal/common/testutil/envtest/setup.go` (YAGNI — only Keystone tests need the Keystone scheme)
- CI pipeline changes for `test-integration` or `e2e` jobs (separate task)
- Makefile target updates (separate task)
- Controller/reconciler implementation (CC-0013)

## Visualization

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    subgraph envtest["envtest Integration Tests"]
        CRD["Install Keystone CRD"] --> REG["Verify CRD Registration"]
        CRD --> VALID["Create Valid CR"]
        CRD --> INVALID["Create Invalid CRs"]
        CRD --> WH["Start Webhook Server"]
        VALID --> ACCEPT["Assert: Accepted"]
        INVALID --> REJECT["Assert: Rejected by CEL"]
        WH --> DEFAULT["Create Zero-Value CR"]
        DEFAULT --> VERIFY["Assert: Fields Defaulted"]
    end

    subgraph chainsaw["Chainsaw E2E - invalid-cr/"]
        DEPLOY["Deploy Operator + Webhook"] --> CRON["Apply CR: Bad Cron"]
        DEPLOY --> DUP["Apply CR: Duplicate Plugins"]
        CRON --> ERR1["Assert: HTTP 422"]
        DUP --> ERR2["Assert: HTTP 422"]
    end

    subgraph sources["Source Artifacts"]
        TYPES["keystone_types.go"] --> CRDYAML["CRD YAML"]
        WEBHOOK["keystone_webhook.go"] --> WHCONFIG["Webhook Config"]
        MAIN["main.go wiring"] --> DEPLOY
        CRDYAML --> CRD
        WHCONFIG --> WH
        CRDYAML --> DEPLOY
        WHCONFIG --> DEPLOY
    end
```

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant T as Test Runner
    participant E as envtest API Server
    participant W as Webhook Server
    participant K as Kubernetes API

    Note over T,E: envtest Integration
    T->>E: Install CRD YAML
    T->>E: Create valid Keystone CR
    E-->>T: 201 Created
    T->>E: Create invalid CR - replicas=0
    E-->>T: 422 Invalid - CEL rejection
    T->>W: Create zero-value CR
    W->>W: Default mutates fields
    W-->>E: Mutated CR
    E-->>T: 201 Created - defaults applied

    Note over T,K: Chainsaw E2E
    T->>K: Apply CR with invalid cron
    K->>W: Validate webhook call
    W-->>K: Denied
    K-->>T: 422 Invalid
```

## Key Components

- **`operators/keystone/main.go`** (modify): Wire `SetupWebhookWithManager(mgr)` call inside `SetupFunc`, replacing the existing `TODO(CC-0012)` comment. ~3-line change.
- **`operators/keystone/config/webhook/`** (generate): Run `controller-gen webhook` per the existing `//go:generate` directive in `groupversion_info.go` to produce webhook manifests. Prerequisite for envtest `WebhookInstallOptions`.
- **`operators/keystone/api/v1alpha1/integration_test.go`** (new): envtest integration test file with `//go:build integration` tag. Tests CRD registration, valid/invalid CR acceptance, webhook defaulting. Uses `NewGomegaWithT(t)` and `envtestutil.SkipIfEnvTestUnavailable(t)` patterns consistent with existing integration tests (e.g., `internal/common/testutil/envtest/integration_test.go`). Reuses `validKeystone()` helper from `keystone_webhook_test.go`.
- **`operators/keystone/internal/testutil/envtest_setup.go`** (new): Keystone-specific envtest helper configuring `envtest.Environment` with `CRDDirectoryPaths` pointing at `config/crd/bases/` and `WebhookInstallOptions` pointing at `config/webhook/`. Path resolution via `runtime.Caller(0)` follows existing `fakeCRDsDirs()` pattern. Registers Keystone types into a local scheme (not modifying `SharedScheme()`).
- **`tests/e2e/keystone/invalid-cr/chainsaw-test.yaml`** (new): Chainsaw test definition (API `v1alpha2`, matching existing `chainsaw-config.yaml`) with two steps asserting webhook rejection.
- **`tests/e2e/keystone/invalid-cr/00-invalid-cron.yaml`** (new): Keystone CR manifest with invalid `fernet.rotationSchedule` value (e.g., `"not-a-cron"`).
- **`tests/e2e/keystone/invalid-cr/01-duplicate-plugins.yaml`** (new): Keystone CR manifest with two `plugins` entries sharing the same `configSection` value.
- **`operators/keystone/config/crd/bases/keystone.openstack.c5c3.io_keystones.yaml`** (existing, not modified): Generated CRD YAML used as `CRDDirectoryPaths` source for envtest.
- **`operators/keystone/api/v1alpha1/keystone_webhook.go`** (existing, not modified): Source of defaulting and validation logic under test. Uses typed generic webhook pattern (`admission.Defaulter[*Keystone]`, `admission.Validator[*Keystone]`).
